---
applyTo: "tests/**/*.js,src/app/**/*.js"
---

# Testing Instructions

- Add unit tests for validators and view models.
- Add integration tests for route behavior and complete journey flows.
- Test validation error rendering with error summaries and field-level messages.
- Test skip-ahead guards for protected pages.
- Test both branches of branching journeys.
- Test check answers rows only show answers relevant to the selected branch.
- Run `npm test` and `npm run lint` before considering work complete.
